name: ExtensionMessageDefinition_Focus_Code
title: R5: code additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MessageDefinition.focus.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MessageDefinition.focus.code` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MessageDefinition.focus.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `MessageDefinition.focus.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `MessageDefinition.focus.code` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MessageDefinition.focus.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MessageDefinition.focus.code` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `MessageDefinition.focus.code` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.comment:
Element `MessageDefinition.focus.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MessageDefinition.focus.code` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `MessageDefinition.focus.code` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
Multiple focuses addressing different resources may occasionally occur.  E.g. to link or unlink a resource from a particular account or encounter, etc.

element.definition: The kind of resource that must be the focus for this message.
element.comment: Multiple focuses addressing different resources may occasionally occur.  E.g. to link or unlink a resource from a particular account or encounter, etc.

binding.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.
